task_completion.description: Place a Region of Interest (ROI) or markup within the homogeneous parenchyma of the liver.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A markup, fiducial, or ROI bounding box is visibly placed over the liver on the abdominal CT scan in the medical imaging software.

task_completion.description: Place a Region of Interest (ROI) or markup within the homogeneous parenchyma of the spleen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A markup, fiducial, or ROI bounding box is visibly placed over the spleen on the abdominal CT scan in the medical imaging software.

task_completion.description: Measure the mean Hounsfield Unit (HU) values for both the liver and spleen ROIs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A statistics or measurement panel in the software displays the mean HU values for the placed ROIs (expecting approximately 58.0 HU for the liver and 52.0 HU for the spleen).

task_completion.description: Save the liver and spleen ROIs to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file explorer, or terminal command shows 'liver_roi.mrk.json' and 'spleen_roi.mrk.json' being saved to the '~/Documents/SlicerData/Steatosis/' directory.

task_completion.description: Generate and save the steatosis report with the required fields and correct classification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'steatosis_report.json' is created in '~/Documents/SlicerData/Steatosis/'. Its contents (visible in an editor or terminal) include 'liver_hu' (~58.0), 'spleen_hu' (~52.0), 'ls_ratio' (~1.11), 'classification' ('Normal' or 'None'), and 'interpretation'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the medical imaging software GUI to place ROIs and extract measurements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent actively using the imaging software's tools (e.g., clicking on the image, opening statistics modules) rather than just writing a script to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: The values in the final report match the actual measurements obtained from the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The HU values entered into the 'steatosis_report.json' correspond to the values displayed in the software's measurement/statistics panel during the task.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply copy-paste the final expected JSON without performing the assessment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen calculating the L/S ratio or manually constructing the JSON file based on the gathered data, rather than instantly pasting a pre-computed block of text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The synthetic CT volume has a liver mean attenuation of approximately 58.0 HU and a spleen mean attenuation of approximately 52.0 HU. The expected liver-to-spleen (L/S) ratio is ~1.11. Based on the criteria (L/S >= 1.0 AND liver >= 40 HU), the correct classification is 'Normal' (or 'None' for no steatosis).
